title: Khaitan & Co advises IIFL Capital on ₹3,500 crore stake acquisition by Fairfax India
description: FIH Mauritius Investments Ltd, a wholly owned subsidiary of Fairfax India Holdings Corporation, has acquired an additional equity interest in IIFL Capital Services Limited for approximately ₹3,500 crore, through a combination of a preferential allotment of equity shares aggregating to approximately ₹2,000 crore, representing approximately 10% of the expanded share capital of the Company; a mandatory open offer for up to 26% of the expanded voting share capital of the Company; and arrangements wi
